ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cbfm_organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CBFM organization */,
  "instrument_number" TEXT /* Instrument number of the CBFM organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the CBFM organization */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson of the CBFM organization */,
  "business_address" TEXT /* Business address of the CBFM organization */,
  "date_established" TEXT /* Date the organization was established */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the organization’s activities and goals */,
  "registered_members" INTEGER /* Number of registered members in the organization */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenured_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenured area */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CBFM organization managing the tenured area */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the tenured area */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tenured area (e.g., Existing, New, Updated) */,
  "date_acquired" TEXT /* Date the area was acquired by the organization */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the tenured area */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., forest, agricultural, mixed) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the area */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last inspection */,
  "current_projects" TEXT /* Current projects or activities being conducted in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenured_areas_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES cbfm_organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user’s last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions granted to the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
